_comment: CPU zone preview — the inspectable pre-step (Codex's rule, belt edition): the GPU must not decide the mask. This graph runs ONLY detection: find the face on the target, build the soft combined mask, and save BOTH a diagnostic overlay (zone glowing on the character) and the mask itself — no checkpoint, no diffusion, seconds not minutes. The founder eyeballs/approves the zone, then the swap runs with that exact mask (image.faceswap mask_artifact). Needs Impact Pack (BboxDetectorSEGS/SegsToCombinedMask) + the Ultralytics face detector; MaskToImage/ImageBlend are core ComfyUI.
